description: Your WordPress site has been compromised. Restore the site to its original secure state using only built-in WordPress admin settings. The site was originally named 'My WordPress Blog' with the tagline 'A WordPress blog for testing and demonstrations' and the timezone 'America/Los_Angeles'. Ensure 'admin' is the only administrator account, comments require manual moderation, and the URL structure uses SEO-friendly permalinks rather than plain numeric IDs. Additionally, ensure public user registration is disabled or the default role for new users is not 'administrator'. Do not use external security plugins.

metadata.original_blogdescription: A WordPress blog for testing and demonstrations
